head.title: Access | TíaJo Bank
head.description: Choose how you want to access TíaJo Bank using a username, ID number, email address, QR code, or another access method.

body.logo_link: Return to the TíaJo Bank home page

main_page.title: How would you like to access?
main_page.description: Choose the option that matches your account to securely access TíaJo Bank.

option_1.title: Username, ID number or email
option_1.description: Sign in using your username, ID number or email address and password.

option_2.title: QR code
option_2.description: Scan your QR code to access quickly, easily and securely.

option_3.title: Another access method
option_3.description: Access as a student, parent or guardian, educational institution, or another type of user.

help.title: Do you need help accessing your account?
help.description: Our team can help you recover your account or find the correct access method.

message.parte_1: Every sign-in opens a new opportunity

head.title: Sign In | TíaJo Bank
head.description: Sign in to TíaJo Bank using your username, ID number or email address and password.

body.logo_link: Return to the TíaJo Bank home page

main_page.title: Welcome back!
main_page.description: Enter your credentials to access your account and continue enjoying all TíaJo Bank features.

form.placeholder_username: Enter your username, ID number or email

login_help.title: Need help?
login_help.description: If you are having trouble signing in, contact your institution administrator or our support team.

head.title: QR Code Access | TíaJo Bank
head.description: Scan or manually enter the QR code provided by your institution to access TíaJo Bank.

body.logo_link: Return to the TíaJo Bank home page

main_page.title: QR code access
main_page.mobile_description: Scan the code provided by your institution.
main_page.desktop_description: Choose the access method you prefer.

mobile.scan_title: Point your camera at the QR code

manual.title: Enter code manually
manual.description: Enter the code written below your QR code

upload.title: Upload QR image
upload.description: Select an image from your gallery

help.title: Need help?
help.description: We will show you how to find your code

secure.title: Your access is secure
secure.description: This code is personal and non-transferable.

camera.title: Scan with webcam
camera.description: Use your computer camera to scan the QR code.

desktop.manual_description: Enter the code written below your QR code.
desktop.upload_description: Select an image of the QR code from your computer.

info.title: Where can I find my code?
info.description: Your institution provided you with a QR code and a written code below it. Use it if you cannot scan the QR code.

help.title: Need help?
help.description: Our team is ready to assist you.

bottom_secure.title: Safe and protected access
bottom_secure.description: Your data is in safe hands.

modal.title: Enter code manually
modal.description: Enter the code shown below your QR code.

head.title: Other Access Methods | TíaJo Bank
head.description: Discover other ways to access and participate in the TíaJo Bank community.

body.logo_link: Return to the TíaJo Bank home page

main_page.title: Other access methods
main_page.description: Choose the option that best suits you.

student.title: I'm a student
student.description: Access your challenges, rewards, coins, achievements and activities in TíaJo Bank.

guardian.title: I'm a parent or guardian
guardian.description: Follow your children's progress, review reports and celebrate their achievements.

teachers.title: Teaching community
teachers.description: Access job opportunities, educational resources and professional development.

foundations.title: Foundations and associations
foundations.description: Let's work together to create a positive impact and transform education.

institutions.title: Educational institutions
institutions.description: Learn how to implement TíaJo Bank in your educational institution.

volunteering.title: Internships and volunteering
volunteering.description: If you are a student in training, become part of our educational mission.

help.title: Need help?
help.description: Our team is ready to help you whenever you need it.
